biological_replicate: derived from each of two separate replicate samples collected from the spring
technical_replicate: identified in no less than two different extraction/analysis methods
experimental_design: field observations and sampling of microbial mats
field observations of these fettuccini-like microbial mats at Mammoth Hot Springs
factor_value: the evolutionarily ancient Aquificales bacterium Sulfurihydrogenibium spp.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
